summary: BidBlitz Händler-Gutscheine System Testing Complete - All features verified successfully. VoucherAuctionsSection removed from homepage, new /haendler-gutscheine page created with merchant list and voucher bidding, Admin Panel has 'Händler-Gutscheine' tab under 'Gutscheine & Codes' category.

voucher_auctions_section_removed_from_ho.description: VoucherAuctionsSection is NOT present on homepage. Home.js does not import or render any voucher section component.

haendler_gutscheine_page_created.description: New page /haendler-gutscheine exists and shows list of all merchants/partners

details.title: Händler-Gutscheine
details.subtitle: Ersteigere Gutscheine bei lokalen Partnern
how_it_works_steps: Gewinnen Sie und lösen Sie beim Händler ein
features: Filter buttons (Alle, Restaurants, Bars, Cafés, Einzelhandel, Wellness)

merchant_detail_page.description: Clicking on a merchant navigates to /haendler-gutscheine/{merchantId} showing merchant details and vouchers

admin_panel_haendler_gutscheine_tab.description: Admin Panel has 'Händler-Gutscheine' tab under 'Gutscheine & Codes' category (line 1217 in Admin.js)

api_merchant_vouchers_merchants.description: GET /api/merchant-vouchers/merchants returns all partners with voucher_count

api_merchant_vouchers_merchant_id_vouche.description: GET /api/merchant-vouchers/merchant/{id}/vouchers returns vouchers for specific merchant

api_merchant_vouchers_admin_create.description: POST /api/merchant-vouchers/admin/create successfully creates voucher auction for merchant

features_page_link.description: Features page has 'Händler-Gutscheine' link with 'NEU' badge and description 'Ersteigere Gutscheine bei lokalen Partnern'

critical_code_review_comments: MerchantVouchersPage.js: Well-structured component with proper translations (de/en), filter functionality, and merchant detail view
AdminMerchantVouchers.js: Admin UI for creating vouchers with partner selection, form validation, and voucher list display
merchant_vouchers.py: Backend API with proper endpoints for merchants, vouchers, and admin operations
Admin.js line 1217: 'Händler-Gutscheine' tab correctly added under 'Gutscheine & Codes' category
App.js lines 719-722: Routes for /haendler-gutscheine and /merchant-vouchers properly configured
seed_data_creation: Test vouchers created via API during testing (TEST_Voucher_*, TEST_Integration_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Händler-Gutscheine system fully implemented: 1) VoucherAuctionsSection removed from homepage, 2) New /haendler-gutscheine page shows all merchants with filter/search, 3) Clicking merchant shows their vouchers with 'Jetzt bieten' button, 4) Admin Panel has 'Händler-Gutscheine' tab under 'Gutscheine & Codes' for creating vouchers, 5) All backend APIs working: GET /api/merchant-vouchers/merchants, GET /api/merchant-vouchers/merchant/{id}/vouchers, POST /api/merchant-vouchers/admin/create
